contexts.context: …record types can be recursive, but you can’t <mark>instantiate</mark> them with something that’s cyclic.
…A can refer to type B, but you can <mark>instantiate</mark> an A-B-A cycle, even with functions.
MK: You’ve <mark>instantiated</mark> both record types, but there’s no cycle between…
…isn’t visible in the DOM. It’s used for <mark>instantiating</mark> something
